notes.name: Aunty Bukola
notes.message: From the day you brought him home, I knew. May your union be a roof in every storm and a window in every season. We love you both.

notes.name: Uche & Ada
notes.message: Twelve years of friendship and we’ve never seen Tiwa look at anyone the way he looks at you, Eni. Cheers to the easiest yes of his life.

notes.name: Pastor Ade
notes.message: Ẹ kú orí ire. May the Lord who began this good work in you both bring it to a glorious completion. Counting down the days.

notes.name: The London Cousins
notes.message: We are already practising our dance steps. Save us a slow song and a slice of cake.
